description.value:
Send Medication prescription script1-wijziging building blocks for patient P. XXX_Schut
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: KWAL script 1 - Wijziging Kwalificatie script 1 - Wijziging: medicatievoorschrift met wijziging over chemotherapie. Let op: wijziging op basis van kwalificatie script 1
Send Medication prescription script1-wijziging resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984') ))).where(modifierExtension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-StopType').value.coding.code = '410546004').count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984') ))).where(modifierExtension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-StopType').exists().not()).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '59366|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (CAPECITABINE TABLET FO 500MG)
